message:
feat(ars): add reflex evolution engine for v1→v2 synthesis mapping

Implements ft-tkpgy.4.4: version-tracked reflex evolution with lineage
graph, auto-deprecation of drifted parents, maturity status transitions,
and max depth enforcement. 28 inline tests + 20 proptests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
